title: astragalus supralaevis
intro: Astragalus supralaevis, also known as the Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Astragalus supralaevis include boosting the immune system, reducing fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Astragalus supralaevis can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
